summary: Added createBackupEvent (NIP-44 encrypt + kind 30078), publishBackup (collect + encrypt + sign + publish via getBackupRelays relay set, returns {ok,error}), fetchBackup (fetch + decrypt + version validate), and getBackupRelays (kind 30051 with DEFAULT_RELAYS fallback). 10 new tests cover encryption, publish flow, failure indicator, missing backup, newest-event selection, version validation, and relay list resolution.
verification_notes: Fixed publishBackup to use getBackupRelays() for relay selection, return {ok,error} failure indicator, and added 2 tests for publishBackup. All verification questions passed.
